indications.text:
Prevention of Malaria: MALARONE is indicated for the prophylaxis of P. falciparum malaria,
including in areas where chloroquine resistance has been reported (see CLINICAL STUDIES).
This label may not be the latest approved by FDA.
For current labeling information, please visit https://www.fda.gov/dr...

1.1 Prevention of Malaria
MALARONE® is indicated for the prophylaxis of Plasmodium falciparum malaria,
including in areas where chloroquine resistance has been reported.
